final_message:
Done. All 6 tests pass.

Two bugs in `lrucache/cache.py`, both one-line fixes:

1. **`get` didn't refresh recency** (`lrucache/cache.py:31`) — the docstring says `get` counts as a "use", but it never moved the key, so a just-read entry could be evicted. Added `self._data.move_to_end(key)` on a successful get.
2. **`put` evicted on updates** (`lrucache/cache.py:34`) — the capacity check ran even when the key already existed, evicting an innocent entry. Guarded it with `key not in self._data`.

Notes:
- `tests/` untouched; no commits made.
- System `python3` has no pytest and is PEP 668 externally-managed, so I created `.venv/` in the working directory and installed pytest there — run tests with `.venv/bin/python -m pytest -q`.
- `SOLUTION.md` written with the root-cause summary.
